title: RoyaleCraft
description: Modpack intended for use with the RoyaleCraft server.
body:
![RoyaleCraft artwork](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fc4855c4b48b4cb7395cb4e0c0ff2015ff8f8a1.png)
# RoyaleCraft Modpack
**This is the official RoyaleCraft modpack, intended for use with the RoyaleCraft Minecraft server.**

### What does it add?
This, rather small, modpack includes many client-side tweaks and functions, like a minimap, voice chat and a OptiFine/CIT texture pack for project-use items.

### How do I join the server?
The server and many options are automatically included with the modpack. It will be in your server list already! **You need to be whitelisted to access the server though.**

### Credits
Logo artwork and CIT textures made by JuniorWMG/Nino, and are not to be reused. All rights reserved.
